name: ARVANA INC
business: Arvana Inc, through its wholly owned subsidiary Down2Fish, operates a Florida-based fishing charter business offering inshore, offshore, sight-seeing, and custom charters for fishing enthusiasts, nature lovers, and tourists in the Tampa Bay area.

catalysts.event: Maturity date of secured promissory note extended to August 15, 2025
catalysts.sentence: The parties have agreed to extend the maturity date of the Note to August 15, 2025.

tamClaims.claim: Fishing charter industry revenue in 2023 was $440.3 million, declining at an annualized rate of 4.8% over the prior five years.
tamClaims.sentence: Overall revenue was estimated to drop at an annualized rate of 4.8% through that period to $440.3 million.

tamClaims.claim: Fishing charter industry revenue forecast to grow at an annualized rate of 3.0% to $511.3 million over the next five years.
tamClaims.sentence: has forecast an increase in revenue at an annualized rate of 3.0% to $511.3 over the next five years
